root_cause: Test false positive on case-insensitive filesystem (macOS-mounted volume). Path.exists() for lowercase 'nvda' returns True because the filesystem treats it the same as uppercase 'NVDA'. The code correctly normalizes tickers to uppercase — no duplicate directories are created.
fix_description: Changed test to use os.listdir() to check actual directory names rather than Path.exists() which is case-insensitive on the mounted volume.
classification: Level 2 — test methodology issue, not implementation bug
